name: Easy Rocky Road
recipeInstructions:
1. Microwave Directions:
- Butter an 8-inch square pan.
- In a large microwave-safe bowl, combine chocolate chips, butter, and shortening.
- Microwave at MEDIUM (50%) for 5 to 7 minutes or until the chips are melted and the mixture is smooth when stirred.
- Add marshmallows and nuts; blend well.
- Spread evenly into the prepared pan.
- Cover; chill until firm.
- Cut into 2-inch squares.
